Bootstrap Draft Review

A seed draft for reviewing generated Northroot publication material.

This area holds draft material before editorial review. Drafts are not canonical references and should not be treated as published guidance.

Source

northroot/site/README.md

Explanations live here. Canonical contracts remain in source.
